lines.text: [bank subsidiary scope] HFI loans CECL (ASC 326-20 lifetime ECL, uncapped): amortized cost $1,800,000,000, allowance $23,400,000 using WARM per ASC 326 326-20-30-1, 326-20-50-4.

[bank subsidiary scope] Loan portfolio segmented (C&I, CRE-owner-occupied, CRE-non-owner-occupied, Residential 1-4 family, Consumer, Construction) with CECL allowances by segment per ASC 326 326-20-50-4, 326-20-55-5.
[bank subsidiary scope] Nonaccrual loans $8,200,000; charge-offs YTD $1,850,000, recoveries $320,000 per ASC 310 310-10-35-7, 326-20-50-6.

[bank subsidiary scope] AFS debt CECL (ASC 326-30 credit loss component, capped at unrealized loss $27,000,000): amortized cost $312,000,000, fair value $285,000,000 per ASC 326 326-30-35-1, 326-30-50-1.
[bank subsidiary scope] HTM debt CECL (ASC 326-20 lifetime ECL, uncapped): amortized cost $145,000,000, fair value $132,000,000, allowance $13,000,000 per ASC 326 326-20-30-1, 326-20-55-1.
[bank subsidiary scope] OBS commitments CECL reserve on $425,000,000 undrawn commitments and $18,000,000 financial guarantees per ASC 326 326-20-30-11, 326-20-55-19.
[bank subsidiary scope] Allowance rollforward reconciles HFI ($23,400,000), AFS credit loss component, HTM, and OBS CECL buckets per ASC 326 326-20-50-5, 326-30-50-2.
[bank subsidiary scope] Cash flow hedge notional $150,000,000 with contemporaneous hedge documentation per ASC 815 815-20-25-3, 815-20-35-1.
[bank subsidiary scope] Fair value hedge notional $75,000,000 with contemporaneous hedge documentation per ASC 815 815-25-35-1, 815-20-25-3.
[bank subsidiary scope] Investment classification: AFS debt securities present; HTM debt securities present; total assets $2,500,000,000 per ASC 320 320-10-25-1, 825-10-25-1.
[bank subsidiary scope] Regulatory capital ratios: CET1 13.74%, Tier 1 13.74%, Total 15.13%, leverage 10.72% per ASC 942 12 CFR Part 217, Basel III CET1.
[bank subsidiary scope] Risk-weighted assets $1,950,000,000 per ASC 942 12 CFR Part 217.31, RWA disclosure.
[bank subsidiary scope] FFIEC 051 reduced schedule scope (graceful degradation — no full RC-D detail required) per ASC 942 FFIEC Call Report, RC-D schedule.
[bank subsidiary scope] AOCI opt-out election elected for eligible community bank (total assets $2,500,000,000) per ASC 825 825-10-45-4, AOCI opt-out election.

augmentedNarratives: Community bank, ~$2.5B assets, FFIEC 051, CECL/WARM, AOCI opt-out elected
